name: Accessibility Insights
description: Accessibility Insights — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: Accessibility Insights — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: Accessibility Insights: Accessibility Insights — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: FastPass ARIA landmark check before every release
Assessment-mode deep audit for WCAG 2.1 compliance
Keyboard navigation testing for complex web app flows
Screen reader compatibility validation for new components
CI-integrated tab stop visualization for React UI library

pros: FastPass workflow covers automated and assisted checks
Clear guided instructions for manual WCAG tests
Works on Windows desktop apps and web
cons: Browser extension UX is functional but dated
Requires manual effort for thorough audits
Not designed for continuous monitoring at scale
review.verdict: Best free pick for guided WCAG checks, especially on Microsoft stacks, but not a replacement for monitoring platforms.
review.best_for: Developers and QA doing per-page or per-feature accessibility reviews.
review.not_for: Teams needing continuous monitoring across hundreds of pages.

developer_experience.reason: Chrome ext, Windows tool, CLI; good docs
